tasks.title: Project scaffold setup
tasks.description: Initialize React + TypeScript + Vite project at gui/ with FastAPI backend at backend/. Scaffold includes Tailwind CSS, react-router, react-query, react-hook-form, zod, recharts, @tanstack/react-table, lucide-react. Backend includes FastAPI with CORS, Pydantic models, and API router structure. E2E tests at tests/ define the API contract.
acceptance_criteria: Vite dev server starts on port 5173
gui/src directory structure has features/, components/, hooks/, types/, lib/, api/

tasks.title: Parameter schema API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement GET /api/v1/parameters/schema endpoint that loads parameter_schema.json and serves it to the frontend. Response must be a JSON object with a 'parameters' key containing an array of parameter definitions. Each parameter must have: name, type, required, description, category fields. Parameter types must match the golden schema: 'numeric', 'numeric_array', 'string', 'boolean'. Categories must include: microscope, hardware, ctf, alignment, classification. Required parameters (PIXEL_SIZE, Cs, VOLTAGE, AMPCONT, nGPUs, nCpuCores, symmetry) must be marked required=true. Ranges must be [min, max] with min<=max.
acceptance_criteria: Response is JSON object with 'parameters' array
All parameters have name, type, required, description, category fields
Parameter types are from set: numeric, numeric_array, string, boolean
Categories include: microscope, hardware, ctf, alignment, classification
Required parameters (PIXEL_SIZE, Cs, VOLTAGE, AMPCONT, nGPUs, nCpuCores, symmetry) marked correctly
Ranges are valid [min, max] with min<=max

tasks.title: Parameter schema API endpoint - UI component only
tasks.description: Implement frontend UI for: Implement GET /api/v1/parameters/schema endpoint that loads parameter_schema.json and serves it to the frontend. Response must be a JSON object with a 'parameters' key containing an array of parameter definitions. Each parameter must have: name, type, required, description, category fields. Parameter types must match the golden schema: 'numeric', 'numeric_array', 'string', 'boolean'. Categories must include: microscope, hardware, ctf, alignment, classification. Required parameters (PIXEL_SIZE, Cs, VOLTAGE, AMPCONT, nGPUs, nCpuCores, symmetry) must be marked required=true. Ranges must be [min, max] with min<=max.. No backend integration yet.

tasks.title: Parameter schema API endpoint - Backend endpoint
tasks.description: Implement backend logic for: Implement GET /api/v1/parameters/schema endpoint that loads parameter_schema.json and serves it to the frontend. Response must be a JSON object with a 'parameters' key containing an array of parameter definitions. Each parameter must have: name, type, required, description, category fields. Parameter types must match the golden schema: 'numeric', 'numeric_array', 'string', 'boolean'. Categories must include: microscope, hardware, ctf, alignment, classification. Required parameters (PIXEL_SIZE, Cs, VOLTAGE, AMPCONT, nGPUs, nCpuCores, symmetry) must be marked required=true. Ranges must be [min, max] with min<=max.

tasks.title: Parameter schema API endpoint - Frontend/backend integration
Parameter validation API endpoint
tasks.description: Implement POST /api/v1/parameters/validate endpoint. Accepts JSON body {parameters: {name: value, ...}}. Returns {valid: bool, errors: [], warnings: []}. Must validate: required parameters present, values within declared ranges, correct types (numeric vs string vs boolean). Must accept deprecated parameter names (e.g., flgCCCcutoff -> ccc_cutoff) and silently map to current names. See Appendix B of build-context-master.md for full deprecated name mapping.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/parameters/validate returns 200 with valid=true for complete valid params
Missing required parameter returns valid=false with error mentioning parameter name
Out-of-range value (VOLTAGE=100) returns valid=false with error mentioning VOLTAGE
Deprecated name flgCCCcutoff accepted and mapped to ccc_cutoff

tasks.title: Project management API endpoints
tasks.description: Implement project CRUD at /api/v1/projects. POST /api/v1/projects accepts {name, directory, parameters} and returns 201 with {id, state, name, directory, ...}. State must be UNINITIALIZED for new projects. GET /api/v1/projects/{id} returns project state. GET /api/v1/projects/{id}/tilt-series returns tilt series list (empty for new projects). 404 for nonexistent projects. 400/422 if name is missing. Projects must create the standard emClarity directory structure (rawData/, fixedStacks/, aliStacks/, cache/, convmap/, FSC/, logFile/).
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/projects/{id} returns 200 with state, name fields
GET /api/v1/projects/{id}/tilt-series returns empty list for new project
Standard directory structure created on disk

tasks.title: Workflow state machine API endpoints
tasks.description: Implement workflow state machine endpoints at /api/v1/workflow. GET /api/v1/workflow/{project_id}/available-commands returns list of commands available in current state. GET /api/v1/workflow/state-machine returns full state machine definition with states and transitions. POST /api/v1/workflow/{project_id}/run accepts {command, args} and rejects commands whose prerequisites are not met (returns 400/409/422). State machine: UNINITIALIZED->TILT_ALIGNED->CTF_ESTIMATED->RECONSTRUCTED->PARTICLES_PICKED->INITIALIZED->CYCLE_N->EXPORT->DONE. In UNINITIALIZED state, only autoAlign is available. avg requires init complete. reconstruct requires averaging complete.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/v1/workflow/{project_id}/available-commands returns autoAlign for UNINITIALIZED project
init, avg, alignRaw, reconstruct NOT available in UNINITIALIZED state
GET /api/v1/workflow/state-machine returns 200 with state definitions including UNINITIALIZED
POST /api/v1/workflow/{project_id}/run with avg in UNINITIALIZED returns 400/409/422
POST /api/v1/workflow/{project_id}/run with reconstruct in UNINITIALIZED returns 400/409/422

tasks.title: System info and job management API endpoints
tasks.description: Implement GET /api/v1/system/info returning cpu_count (positive int), gpus (list of objects with 'name' field), memory_total_gb or memory_gb or memory, and hostname (non-empty string). GPU detection via nvidia-smi subprocess. Implement GET /api/v1/jobs with project_id filter, returning empty list initially. GET /api/v1/jobs/{id} returning 404 for nonexistent. Job model must have id, project_id, command, status fields in OpenAPI schema. Job status enum must include: PENDING, RUNNING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED.
acceptance_criteria: Response includes gpus (list, may be empty)
Response includes memory info (memory_total_gb or similar)
GET /api/v1/jobs returns empty list for new project
Job model in OpenAPI has id, project_id, command, status fields
Status enum includes PENDING, RUNNING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED

tasks.title: Frontend parameter editor component
tasks.description: Build the ParametersPage component at gui/src/features/parameters/. Must fetch parameter schema from /api/v1/parameters/schema via react-query and render a tabbed form grouped by parameter category. Each category (microscope, hardware, ctf, alignment, classification, etc.) gets its own tab. Parameters render appropriate input widgets: numeric inputs for type 'numeric', text inputs for 'string', checkboxes for 'boolean', multi-value inputs for 'numeric_array'. Required parameters marked with asterisk. Validation errors shown inline via react-hook-form + zod. Submit button triggers POST /api/v1/parameters/validate.
acceptance_criteria: Parameter schema fetched from backend on mount
Parameters grouped by category in tabs
Numeric, string, boolean inputs render correctly per type
Required parameters marked with visual indicator

tasks.title: Frontend project manager component
tasks.description: Build the ProjectPage component at gui/src/features/project/. Must include: (1) Create New Project form with fields for name, directory path, and microscope parameters (PIXEL_SIZE, Cs, VOLTAGE, AMPCONT). Form validation via zod schemas. Submit calls POST /api/v1/projects. (2) Project status dashboard showing current state, cycle number, and per-tilt-series completion. Fetches from GET /api/v1/projects/{id}. (3) Navigation to load existing projects.
acceptance_criteria: New Project form renders with all required fields
Form validation prevents submission without required fields
Successful creation navigates to project dashboard
Dashboard shows project state and cycle number

tasks.title: Frontend workflow runner component
tasks.description: Build the WorkflowPage component at gui/src/features/workflow/. Must display the pipeline state machine as a visual diagram/stepper showing all states (UNINITIALIZED through DONE). Current state highlighted. Available commands shown as enabled buttons, unavailable commands grayed out with tooltip explaining prerequisite. Clicking a command button opens a configuration dialog then calls POST /api/v1/workflow/{project_id}/run. State refreshes after command execution.
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline states displayed as visual stepper

tasks.title: Frontend tilt-series manager component
tasks.description: Build the TiltSeriesPage component at gui/src/features/tilt-series/. Must use @tanstack/react-table to display a sortable, filterable table of tilt series with columns: name, status (aligned/CTF estimated/reconstructed), file path. Status indicators use color-coded badges. Batch operations toolbar for running autoAlign and ctf estimate on selected tilt series. Empty state message when no tilt series available.
acceptance_criteria: Row selection enables batch operations toolbar
Empty state displayed when no tilt series
Batch operation buttons call correct endpoints

tasks.title: Frontend job monitor component
tasks.description: Build the JobsPage component at gui/src/features/jobs/. Must display running/completed jobs in a table with columns: command, status, start time, duration. Status uses color-coded badges (RUNNING=blue, COMPLETED=green, FAILED=red, CANCELLED=gray). Log viewer panel shows real-time log output for selected job (poll GET /api/v1/jobs/{id}/log). Cancel button for running jobs (DELETE /api/v1/jobs/{id}). Auto-refresh job list every 5 seconds.
acceptance_criteria: Job table renders with status badges

tasks.title: Frontend results viewer component
tasks.description: Build the ResultsPage component at gui/src/features/results/. Must include: (1) FSC curve plotter using recharts - fetches FSC data and renders resolution curves with 0.143 threshold line marked. (2) Particle statistics panel showing count, class distribution, CCC score histogram. (3) System info panel showing GPU status from GET /api/v1/system/info.
acceptance_criteria: 0.143 threshold line displayed on FSC plot
System info panel shows GPU/CPU info
Placeholder state when no results available

tasks.title: Frontend utilities panel component
tasks.description: Build the UtilitiesPage component at gui/src/features/utilities/. Must include cards/sections for: (1) Mask Creator - form for emClarity mask command parameters. (2) Volume Rescaler - form for emClarity rescale parameters. (3) Geometry Operations - dropdown for geometry operations (RemoveClasses, RemoveFraction, etc.). (4) System Check - button that calls emClarity check and displays results.
acceptance_criteria: Four utility sections render with forms

tasks.title: Parameter file import/export
tasks.description: Implement parameter file I/O: (1) Backend: GET /api/v1/parameters/file/{path} reads MATLAB-style param.m files and returns parsed parameters. POST /api/v1/parameters/file saves validated parameters back to param.m format. (2) Frontend: Add Import/Export buttons to ParametersPage. Import button opens file picker, loads param.m, populates form. Export button writes current form values to param.m file. Must handle deprecated parameter name migration on import.
acceptance_criteria: Backend reads MATLAB param.m format correctly
Frontend Import button loads parameters into form
Frontend Export button triggers file save
Deprecated parameter names migrated on import

tasks.title: App shell layout and navigation
tasks.description: Polish the MainLayout component with proper responsive sidebar navigation, header with project name display, and consistent page transitions. Sidebar must highlight active route. Header should show current project name and state badge when a project is loaded. Add a settings gear icon that opens a system info panel. Ensure all feature routes are accessible and the app has a clean, professional scientific look using Tailwind CSS.
acceptance_criteria: Header shows project name when loaded
Responsive layout works at common screen sizes

tasks.title: Integration testing and E2E validation
tasks.description: Ensure all E2E tests in tests/ pass against the running backend. Fix any remaining API contract misalignments between backend endpoints and test expectations. All endpoints must use /api/v1/ prefix. Backend must serve OpenAPI spec at /openapi.json. Run pytest tests/ -v against a live backend instance and fix all failures.
acceptance_criteria: All 35 E2E tests in tests/ pass
Backend unit tests still pass (pytest backend/tests/)
No test files modified (tests/ directory immutable)
